parameters.content:
## TB Lead Router
Receives EVERYTHING from tbsol.net (leads, client intakes, support tickets) and routes each one:

• Website lead → email Nick
• Client intake (/start) → email Nick + welcome email to the client
• Support ticket (/support) → email Nick + confirmation to the client

### Setup (one time)
1. Open each Email node → pick your email credential (Gmail/SMTP → Create new if none).
2. Save, then flip this workflow **Active** (top-right).

The webhook path matches what the site already sends to — no site changes needed.

parameters.subject: =🚀 New client intake: {{ $json.body.business || $json.body.name }}
=Welcome aboard, {{ $json.body.name }}! 🎉 — TB Solutions
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.body.name }},

Thanks for filling out the intake for {{ $json.body.business }} — I've got everything I need to start.

What happens next:
1. I review your details today.
2. I reach out to lock in your kickoff call.
3. You get a simple plan — no jargon, no pressure.

Want to grab a time right now? Book here:
https://calendar.app.google/SbFwfmkwTJoRPDBc9

Talk soon,
Nick
TB Solutions — tbsol.net

parameters.subject: =🛟 {{ $json.body.priority === 'Urgent — site is down / broken' ? '🔴 URGENT ' : '' }}Ticket: {{ $json.body.ticket_type }} — {{ $json.body.business }}
=Got your request ✅ — TB Solutions
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.body.name }},

Your request just landed in my queue:

“{{ $json.body.details }}”

Type: {{ $json.body.ticket_type }}
Priority: {{ $json.body.priority }}

I'll review it and get back to you — urgent site-down issues jump the line.

— Nick, TB Solutions
tbsol.net

parameters.subject: =🔥 New lead: {{ $json.body.name || $json.body.business || 'Website visitor' }}
